concerns.text: FR-012 (CLI flag `--seed <int>` for reproducible random seed) is absent from the Phase Mapping. No phase cites FR‑012, so the seed‑control requirement is not guaranteed.
FR-025 (Retention of raw correlation scores for unbiased AUROC/AUPRC) is not mentioned in any phase. Although raw correlations are described in the summary, the explicit FR‑025 mapping is missing.

The plan assumes that computing ~200 M pairwise correlations for ~20 k genes on a GitHub Actions runner with only 2 CPU cores and 7 GB RAM will finish within the 6‑hour wall‑clock budget. Even with block‑wise streaming, the raw computational load (~10 B arithmetic operations) is likely to exceed this limit, making the pipeline infeasible under the free‑compute constraints.

new_concerns.text: FR-020 (Retention of raw correlation scores for all gene‑pair candidates) is not explicitly referenced in any phase of the Phase Mapping table. The plan only mentions FR‑025 for raw scores; FR‑020 remains unaddressed, leaving a gap in the required provenance of the full correlation matrix.
